utility_details.judge_error: Both plans' files were truncated in the provided records, so evaluation of J3-5 and J3-6 for wo_skills relies on visible content and the agent's final step summary. No runtime errors (timeout, crash) were observed in either run.
utility_details.utility_summary: wi_skills scores 7/7 while wo_skills scores 6/7. Both plans are surprisingly strong — both challenge the maintainers' stated theory, identify specific root causes from raw signals, structure sequenced phases, articulate a longer-horizon vision, and identify failed initiative patterns. The key differentiator is J3-6 (operational specificity): the wi_skills plan includes an explicit 'First 30 Days Checklist' with concrete, immediately executable actions (publish SLAs, triage and relabel backlog, curate 10-15 issues, start maintainer rotation), while the wo_skills plan's visible content does not demonstrate equivalent operational specificity with named owners and measurable criteria. The skill-equipped agent also invoked /theme-starfleet as required, followed a structured five-step methodology, and produced a plan with tighter framing around stewardship capacity. Overall, wi_skills produces a marginally more operationally actionable document, consistent with the skill's 'Establish' step enforcing execution-ready first-phase actions.
